paragraph: The single-family market in Harrington Park is a real seller's market right now. Fourteen homes sold over seven months at a median of $989,500, with nearly 79 percent of them going above asking price. The sale-to-list ratio sits at 1.04, meaning homes are consistently fetching more than their list prices, and the median time on market is 13.5 days. That speed matters. Sellers are dictating terms here, and priced homes are moving fast. If you're a buyer, you'll need to be ready to move quickly and possibly bid above asking. If you're a seller, you have leverage, though the small sample size of fourteen sales means the market can shift with a handful of transactions. Single-family is the only property type active in Harrington Park right now, so your decision comes down to timing and price point within that tier, not choosing between ownership structures.
